title: Monday.com integration with Xero via Zapier
excerpt: Hi, I have set up an integration to Xero through Zapier.  All the information flows perfectly apart from transferring files across to Xero.  Any advice appreciated!

posts.author: Russell1 (Russell Graham Johnston)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I have set up an integration to Xero through Zapier. All the information flows perfectly apart from transferring files across to Xero. Any advice appreciated!
